**Findings:**

**Bug 1 — WornPathEntry missing visitCount (minor, fixed)**
`/mnt/data/commons-client/src/network.ts`, line 58: The `WornPathEntry` interface didn't include `visitCount`. The server sends `{ tileX, tileY, visitCount }` in the initial tick's `wornPaths` array, but the client type omitted it. `mergeServerWornPaths` received objects where `visitCount` was always `undefined`, so the `if (visitCount > local)` check was always fal...(truncated)
